reason: Preserve TianChen-RV execution-layer boundary and keep tcrv.exec compute-free.
Ensure runtime ABI metadata is requested only after structured capability and legality decisions.
Keep core dialect execution/diagnostic focused while adding metadata materialization.
Define and implement the plugin-owned runtime ABI/emission metadata hook through the registry interface.
Keep RVV/scalar runtime ABI semantics plugin-local rather than target-specific branches in core transforms.
Preserve legality, preference selection, and selected-variant ordering before metadata is requested.
Align emission readiness/materialized emission metadata with durable lowering/runtime boundaries.
Represent RVV emission as plugin-owned unsupported/deferred metadata without claiming executable codegen.
Represent scalar fallback runtime ABI metadata only for legally selected scalar paths.
Add lit/FileCheck and C++ coverage in the organized test layout.
